# Pivotal Tides — llms.txt
# https://pivotaltides.com

## About

Pivotal Tides is a private psychotherapy practice owned and operated by Angelique Danza, M.S., LMFT (CA LMFT112463). The practice is based on the Murrieta–Temecula border in the Inland Empire of Southern California and offers depth-oriented, insight-focused therapy for individuals, couples, and groups.

## Clinician

- Name: Angelique Danza
- Credentials: M.S., Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist
- License: CA LMFT112463, Board of Behavioral Sciences
- Certifications: Certified Women's Mental Health Specialist, Certified in Narcissistic Abuse Treatment, Certified in Anger Management
- Affiliations: CAMFT, ASRH
- Experience: 10+ years providing psychotherapy to children, adolescents, adults, couples, and groups

## Services

- Individual Therapy — $175 per 50-minute session
- Couples Therapy — $190 per 50-minute session
- Group Therapy — contact for current offerings

## Modalities

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Client-Centered Therapy (CCT), Mindfulness-Based approaches, depth-oriented and insight-focused work

## Specialties

Women's issues, life transitions, relationship issues, grief & loss, anger management, family conflict, infertility, infidelity, marital & premarital, narcissistic abuse recovery, self-esteem, stress & burnout, identity & purpose, anxiety & depression

## Insurance

Aetna, Blue Shield, BlueCross BlueShield, Carelon, Cigna/Evernorth, Quest Behavioral Health, out-of-network benefits

## Location & Service Area

Murrieta, CA (Murrieta–Temecula border)
Serving: Murrieta, Temecula, and the broader Inland Empire
In-person and virtual sessions available

## Contact

Phone: (951) 395-6089
Website: https://pivotaltides.com
Free 15-minute consultation available
